narrative:
Union Township G (precinct in Clermont County) has 1,219 registered voters, with 63.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.2%, a clear Republican lean of 11.6 percentage points.
